blocks.en: Every headline Wi-Fi 7 speed comes from one little knob: the EHT-MCS, the Modulation and Coding Scheme. An MCS index is just shorthand for two choices — how many bits each radio symbol carries (the constellation, e.g. BPSK, QPSK, 16-QAM, up to 4096-QAM) and how much of the bitstream is real data versus error-correction overhead (the coding rate, e.g. 1/2, 3/4, 5/6). Pick a high MCS and you pack more bits into the air per microsecond; pick a low one and you trade speed for robustness against noise.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7 那些亮眼的速率数字，全都来自一个小小的旋钮：EHT-MCS，即调制与编码方案（Modulation and Coding Scheme）。一个 MCS 编号其实就是两个选择的简写——每个无线符号携带多少比特（星座图，例如 BPSK、QPSK、16-QAM，最高到 4096-QAM），以及比特流中有多少是真正的数据、多少是纠错冗余（编码率，例如 1/2、3/4、5/6）。选一个高 MCS，你就能在每微秒里塞进更多比特；选一个低 MCS，则是用速度换取对噪声的鲁棒性。

blocks.en: But MCS alone is only one of five multipliers. The actual data rate is the product of: bits per symbol (the constellation), the coding rate, the number of useful data subcarriers (which grows with RU size and channel width), the number of spatial streams (MIMO), and the symbol duration (set by the guard interval — a longer GI is more robust but slower). Wi-Fi 7's gigabit headlines come from pushing all five at once: a fat 320 MHz channel, the new 4096-QAM constellation, many spatial streams, and a short guard interval.
blocks.zh: 但 MCS 只是五个乘数之一。真正的数据速率是下面这些因子的乘积：每符号比特数（星座图）、编码率、有效数据子载波数量（随 RU 尺寸和信道带宽增大）、空间流数量（MIMO），以及符号时长（由保护间隔决定——更长的 GI 更鲁棒但更慢）。Wi-Fi 7 之所以能宣称千兆速率，是因为它把这五项同时拉满：一个宽达 320 MHz 的信道、全新的 4096-QAM 星座图、多条空间流，再加上一个较短的保护间隔。

blocks.en: The biggest new lever is the constellation. Wi-Fi 6 topped out at 1024-QAM (10 bits per symbol). Wi-Fi 7 adds 4096-QAM, packing 12 bits into every symbol — a 20% raw-rate bump over 1024-QAM for the same airtime. The catch: 4096-QAM crams 4096 points into the same I/Q plane, so the points sit very close together. Telling them apart demands an exceptionally clean signal — a high SNR — which in practice means you must be close to the AP with little interference. That is why 4096-QAM is the privilege of short, strong links, not the everyday rate.
blocks.zh: 最大的新筹码是星座图。Wi-Fi 6 的上限是 1024-QAM（每符号 10 比特）。Wi-Fi 7 增加了 4096-QAM，每个符号携带 12 比特——在相同空口时间下，相对 1024-QAM 原始速率提升约 20%。代价在于：4096-QAM 要把 4096 个点塞进同一个 I/Q 平面，于是这些点彼此靠得非常近。要把它们区分开来，需要异常干净的信号——也就是很高的信噪比（SNR）——实际中这意味着你必须离 AP 很近且几乎没有干扰。这正是为什么 4096-QAM 是近距离强链路的特权，而非日常速率。

blocks.en: Read an MCS table like a menu, not a guarantee. The rate column tells you what the link could deliver if the SNR is high enough to decode that constellation reliably. The rate adaptation logic in the radio constantly measures the channel and dials the MCS up or down — high MCS up close, lower MCS as you walk away — so you almost never sit at the top rate for long.
blocks.zh: 读 MCS 速率表要把它当成菜单，而不是保证。速率那一列告诉你的是：如果 SNR 足够高、能可靠解出那个星座图，链路最多能跑多快。无线芯片里的速率自适应逻辑会持续测量信道，把 MCS 上调或下调——靠近时用高 MCS，走远时换低 MCS——所以你几乎不会长时间停在最高速率上。

blocks.en: Wi-Fi 7 also keeps two special low-end tools for the opposite problem: punching a signal through over a very wide channel. EHT-MCS 14 and 15 turn on DCM (Dual-Carrier Modulation) on top of the most robust setting, BPSK — each is single-spatial-stream only. And EHT-MCS 14 doubles as the special EHT DUP mode: in the 6 GHz band, over 80/160/320 MHz, the payload is BPSK-DCM modulated with rate-1/2 LDPC and then literally duplicated across the lower and upper halves of the channel. The rate is tiny (just 36 Mb/s at 320 MHz), but it spreads the same bits across the whole band so a control frame survives even when the link is marginal.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7 还保留了两个面向相反问题的低端工具：让信号在极宽的信道上稳稳穿透出去。EHT-MCS 14 和 15 会在最鲁棒的 BPSK 之上再叠加 DCM（双载波调制，Dual-Carrier Modulation）——两者都仅支持单空间流。而 EHT-MCS 14 还兼任专门的 EHT DUP 模式：在 6 GHz 频段、80/160/320 MHz 带宽下，载荷先用 BPSK-DCM 调制、配 1/2 码率的 LDPC 编码，然后被原样复制到信道的低半部和高半部。它的速率极小（320 MHz 下仅 36 Mb/s），但把同样的比特铺满整个频段，使得即便链路处于临界状态，控制帧也能存活下来。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 170' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11'><line x1='30' y1='150' x2='300' y2='150' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='30' y1='150' x2='30' y2='20' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1'/><text x='150' y='166' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>MCS index (constellation)</text><text x='12' y='90' fill='currentColor' transform='rotate(-90 12 90)' text-anchor='middle'>rate</text><polyline points='40,140 90,118 140,92 200,60 250,38 280,28' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='40' cy='140' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='90' cy='118' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='140' cy='92' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='200' cy='60' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='250' cy='38' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='280' cy='28' r='3' fill='currentColor'/><text x='40' y='135' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>BPSK</text><text x='140' y='87' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>64</text><text x='200' y='55' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>1024</text><text x='280' y='23' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>4096</text></svg>

caption.en: Climbing the EHT-MCS ladder: each step to a denser constellation lifts the data rate but demands more SNR. 4096-QAM (MCS 12-13) sits at the top — the highest rate, the steepest SNR requirement.
caption.zh: 攀登 EHT-MCS 阶梯：每走向更密集的星座图一步，数据速率就抬高一截，但对 SNR 的要求也更高。4096-QAM（MCS 12-13）位于最顶端——速率最高，对 SNR 的要求也最苛刻。

summary.en: Reading a real EHT-MCS rate row, and where the 320 MHz gigabit number comes from
summary.zh: 读懂一行真实的 EHT-MCS 速率，以及 320 MHz 千兆数字从何而来

blocks.en: In Table 36-86 (EHT-MCSs for the 4×996-tone RU — i.e. a full 320 MHz channel — at NSS,u = 1), each row fixes a modulation and coding rate and lists three data rates, one per guard interval (0.8, 1.6, 3.2 µs). Take MCS 13: 4096-QAM with rate 5/6 carries NBPSCS = 12 coded bits per subcarrier; across NSD = 980 data subcarriers that is NCBPS = 11 760 coded bits per symbol, and after the 5/6 code, NDBPS = 9 800 data bits per symbol. Each EHT data symbol is the 12.8 µs IDFT plus the guard interval, so at the short 0.8 µs GI the symbol is 13.6 µs, giving 9 800 / 13.6 µs ≈ 720 Mb/s per stream. With one stream that is the 2 882.4 Mb/s figure in the table for MCS 13 — multiply by 8 spatial streams and you cross the 20 Gb/s class headline. The same table's MCS 0 (BPSK, 1/2) is only 144.1 Mb/s, and EHT-MCS 14 in EHT DUP mode (Table 36-87) is just 36.0 Mb/s at 320 MHz — the robustness floor.
blocks.zh: 在表 36-86（4×996-tone RU 的 EHT-MCS，即一整个 320 MHz 信道，NSS,u = 1）中，每一行固定一种调制和编码率，并列出对应三种保护间隔（0.8、1.6、3.2 µs）的三个数据速率。以 MCS 13 为例：4096-QAM 配 5/6 码率，每子载波承载 NBPSCS = 12 个编码比特；在 NSD = 980 个数据子载波上即 NCBPS = 11 760 个编码比特/符号，经 5/6 编码后为 NDBPS = 9 800 个数据比特/符号。每个 EHT 数据符号是 12.8 µs 的 IDFT 加保护间隔，因此在 0.8 µs 短 GI 下符号长 13.6 µs，得到 9 800 / 13.6 µs ≈ 720 Mb/s/流。单流即对应表中 MCS 13 的 2 882.4 Mb/s——再乘以 8 条空间流，便跨入 20 Gb/s 量级的标题数字。同一张表里 MCS 0（BPSK、1/2）仅 144.1 Mb/s，而 EHT DUP 模式下的 EHT-MCS 14（表 36-87）在 320 MHz 时只有 36.0 Mb/s——这就是鲁棒性的底线。

cites.note: 36.3.8 EHT modulation and coding schemes — EHT-MCS as compact modulation+coding representation; MCS 14/15 enable DCM on MCS 0, single spatial stream
36.5.16 / Table 36-86 — EHT-MCS rate rows for 4x996-tone (320 MHz) RU, incl. 4096-QAM MCS 12-13; Table 36-87 EHT-MCS 14 EHT DUP rates
36.3.5 EHT DUP transmission — BPSK-DCM, rate-1/2 LDPC, 6 GHz only, 80/160/320 MHz, signaled as MCS 14, payload duplicated across frequency
